holdings.infoBox: CSB is an equity ETF with a total of 102 individual holdings. The top holdings are IDACORP stock at 1.89%, New Jersey Resources at 1.76%, Avista at 1.67%, American States Water Company at 1.64%, and Southwest Gas Holdings at 1.64%.

overview.description: The VictoryShares US Small Cap High Dividend Volatility Wtd ETF (CSB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund tracks the performance of the Compass EMP US Small Cap High Dividend 100 Volatility Weighted Index by investing in small-cap dividend-paying US common stocks. CSB was launched on Jul 8, 2015 and is issued by VictoryShares.
infoTable: Nasdaq Victory U.S. Small Cap High Dividend 100 Volatility Weighted Index

data.title: Cambridge Savings Bank Extends New Credit Facility to Accelerate Growth for Fabrizia Spirits
data.text: CAMBRIDGE, Mass.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #SMBs--Cambridge Savings Bank has provided a new credit facility to Fabrizia Spirits, a leading citrus spirits manufacturer in the United States.

data.title: Valiant Energy Solutions Partners with Cambridge Savings Bank's Asset-Based Lending Team to Expand M&A Capabilities and Deliver Innovative Total Energy Solutions
data.text: CAMBRIDGE, Mass.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #assetbasedlending--Valiant Energy Solutions partners with Cambridge Savings Bank to expand M&A capabilities and deliver innovative total energy solutions.
